rows.label: tev011201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Corondas about the recently
discovered survivors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Corondas if anything
is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Corondas about the
duties of a Pathfinder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Corondas about the
duties of a Pathfinder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0001
rows.name:
You mean the lone survivor found in
Meteor Valley? Pretty crazy, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0003
rows.name:
My team has found plenty of Lifepods that were jettisoned
from the White Whale as it crashed, but they were all
in terrible shape and... Well, no survivors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0004
rows.name:
So it seems this new survivor
got incredibly lucky.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0005
rows.name:
And if my experience has taught me anything,
I'd expect him or her to live a long life
and accomplish many great things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0006
rows.name:
As someone who fell from the peak of Mt. Everest
and actually lived to tell about it, take it
from me. I know what I'm talking about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0009
rows.name:
Well, Team Corondas specializes in exploring
the most dangerous parts of Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0010
rows.name:
As you'd imagine, we suffer a lot of
casualties doing it. All but the bravest
of Pathfinder quickly transfer to other teams.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0011
rows.name:
As a result, we're undermanned. We're always
trying to recruit new members, but there
aren't many BLADEs with the guts to join us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0012
rows.name:
At the moment, all that's left is
myself, Larry, Peter, the new guy,
Bates, and my old friends from way back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0013
rows.name:
That's all. It's a pretty
sad state of affairs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0014
rows.name:
It's breaking my heart. What happened
to all the eager new recruits
brimming with frontier spirit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0022
rows.name:
It ain't easy to accomplish much on this
planet without reliable information.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0023
rows.name:
That's why we enter unexplored
areas ahead of the other Unions
and plant data probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0024
rows.name:
Once installed, a data probe
will send back tons of useful
information over FrontierNet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0025
rows.name:
Sure, the job's dangerous, but getting to
see a new place before anyone else? Ain't
no mission more exciting than that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0026
rows.name:
For a longtime adventurer like me, it's
pretty much the gig of my dreams.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0042
rows.name:
I did a lot of successful expeditions
before I ever boarded the White Whale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0043
rows.name:
The toughest of them all was
the many years I spent surveying
the surface of the Moon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0044
rows.name:
But that job didn't hold a candle to
how hard it is reaching these damned
FrontierNet probe placement sites.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0045
rows.name:
At least this planet has
oxygen—but that's hardly worth
facing all the nasty indigens![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0046
rows.name:
Our mission is all about slipping past the beasties
to reach FrontierNet probe sites that are invariably
at the least-accessible points on the entire planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0047
rows.name:
We put our lives on the line every day,
but that just makes the triumph all the
sweeter when we do reach our target.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Corondas about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0048
rows.name:
Well, I just saved Bates's
sorry ass, for one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0049
rows.name:
But during that mission, a gal named Tempera
showed up in this weird black Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0050
rows.name:
It was closing in on me and Larry, so
we really had to haul ass outta there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0051
rows.name:
That crazy gal was carrying on about her
mom or her big sister or...something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0052
rows.name:
Anyway, you better watch out—we still got
a whole lot of enemies out there. This
planet ain't ours yet. Not by a long shot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Corondas about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0053
rows.name:
Hey, how's it going, [ST:playername ]! Thanks for your
help with that whole Bates thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0054
rows.name:
I've been trying to track down the black
Doll that attacked you and Bates.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0055
rows.name:
If you find out anything about it,
could you give me a heads-up?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0056
rows.name:
Someone needs to be taught a lesson about
picking fights with Team Corondas![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_SEL3011
rows.name:
Ask Corondas about the
duties of a Pathfinder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Corondas about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_SEL3031
rows.name: Ask Corondas about the Lifepoint.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0057
rows.name:
I did a lot of successful expeditions
before I ever boarded the White Whale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0058
rows.name:
The toughest of them all was
the many years I spent surveying
the surface of the Moon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0059
rows.name:
But that job didn't hold a candle to
how hard it is reaching these damned
FrontierNet probe placement sites.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0060
rows.name:
At least this planet has
oxygen—but that's hardly worth
facing all the nasty indigens![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0063
rows.name:
And on top of that, now we got all these weird
xenos gunning for us. We haven't had a single
expedition ever go smoothly. Not a single one![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0064
rows.name:
But that just makes the triumph all the
sweeter when we do reach our target, right?
I'm sure you know what I'm talking about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0067
rows.name:
Well, I've had a pretty rough
time of it, but it ain't dampened
my frontier spirit any.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0068
rows.name:
Actually, my spirit is burning hotter
than ever, despite the fact I just
lost a friend from way back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0069
rows.name:
Bates is actually starting to earn his
keep, and Peter? Man, that guy's got the
boundless curiosity of a true adventurer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0070
rows.name:
And we've still got Larry loving us all to
pieces, so I'm confident Team Corondas's gonna
dust itself off and reclaim its past glory.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0071
rows.name:
Honestly, I'd ask 'em to transfer
you onto my team, but I know there's
no way Elma would give you up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0072
rows.name:
No matter. Let's both just keep on
chasing those sweet Miran dreams.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0078
rows.name:
So is it true? You got back
the comm device with the
coordinates of the Central Life?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0079
rows.name:
To be honest, I was hoping it'd be Team
Corondas bringing back that glory, but
a win's a win. Well done, my friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0080
rows.name:
Team Corondas's not exactly in the best of shape after
all that trouble we had earlier, but you better believe
we'll fight to the last man in the final battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0081
rows.name:
Our real bodies? Humanity's
future? I'm gonna take it
back with my own two hands![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_SEL3041
rows.name: Ask Corondas about the Central Life.

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0082
rows.name:
I wanna stand barefoot on the surface
of Mira and feel the true frontier
spirit course through my veins.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0083
rows.name:
I wonder how long it's gonna take before
the Lifepoint is up and running again?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0084
rows.name:
I know a research party went into the Central Life,
but I haven't heard a word about what they've been
doing there. Himeri that's not a bad sign.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011201_MSG0085
rows.name:
Ah, I gotta stop thinking like
that. It ain't like me to worry.[ST:wait ]
